title: scutellaria alpina var. grandiflora
intro: Scutellaria alpina var. grandiflora, also known as alpine skullcap, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of alpine skullcap include relieving anxiety and insomnia, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Alpine skullcap can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
